pages./nissan-np200/: New Nissan NP200 | NP200 For Sale | Nissan Springs  Nissan NP200 Built to perform, the Nissan NP200 combines toughness, versatility, and reliability in one sleek package. From heavy-duty tasks to everyday adventures, this dependable bakkie ensures unmatched practicality and performance for every journey. Available in powerful and fuel efficient 1.6l petrol and 1.5l dCi engines. Available Models Enquire Now The All-Rounder The Nissan NP200 The Nissan NP200 offers the highest levels of reliability, versatility and durability, in conjunction with the lowest possible levels of overall running and repair costs. Available in powerful and fuel efficient 1.6l petrol and 1.5l dCi engines. Monthly from R2 190 800kg Max Payload 1.81m Load box length 1.26m 3 Load box volume The legacy continues. You drive to where you socialise. You drive to where you work. Then you drive slow to get away from it all every now and then. You need a lot to make all those trips, including a hatchback engineered flawlessly for its natural habitat, the streets – your streets. Rugged and Modern Exterior The Nissan NP200 range gives more than only practicality and under-the-skin durability, it projects a no-nonsense attitude, effortlessly combining practical ruggedness with modern flair. The inside story. The NP200 boasts the biggest interior cabin space in its class with an additional storage area (300l) behind the seats. Extensive storage capacity includes glove box, door bins and drink holders under the central console. High quality aesthetics offer you the luxury and styling of passenger vehicles without compromising on the practicality and versatility that is consistent with a bakkie. Featuring a Larger load box and payload The NP200 is built for the best possible load-carrying performance. That’s why it features the biggest payload in its segment, 800kg along with the segment’s biggest load box volume at 1.26m³. You even get a rubberised surface as standard equipment. ANTI-LOCK BRAKING SYSTEMS The Anti-lock Braking System (ABS) helps prevent wheel lockup by pumping the brakes faster than you ever could during sudden-braking situations, helping you steer around obstacles to avoid a collision. ENGINE IMMOBILIZER The NP200 looks great, but not to thieves. That’s because we gave it an anti-theft system that uses a chip embedded in the key, which triggers a unique starting code that lets your vehicle know it’s you. NP200 Accessories The range of Nissan NP200 accessories allow you to customise your bakkie to suit your individual needs, with peace of mind and quality assurance that comes standard with Nissan Approved Accessories. Accessorise your NP200 with a stainless steel sports bar, tow bar, tonneau cover and choose from various canopies. Performance Power to Perform. With three engine choices – an 8-valve petrol engine, 16-valve petrol engine, or our standard-setting K9K turbo diesel – the NP200 delivers the power you need to get the job done. Power, control and efficiency are in the palm of your hand with the NP200’s 5-speed manual transmission. Safety Raising the bar. The available cab protector roll bar not only provides the NP200 an added dimension of safety, it also gives it a tougher, ready-for-anything look. You can also use the roll bar for additional tie-down points to help secure your cargo. The NP200 also has an engine immobilizer. Suspension Optimum Loadability. When it comes to bakkies, a leaf-sprung rear suspension setup is best since it provides optimum loadability. But since traditional live-axle leaf springs tend to reduce ride quality – especially while carrying a load – we gave it a coilspring-supported H-shaped torsion bar at the back end, giving it a supple ride that beats rival bakkies. Available Models Choose your ideal Nissan Np200 Download Brochure 1.6 8V Base + Safety Start price R 239 950 Key Features: 800kg Payload Rubberised loadbox Power Steering 1.6 8V Base A/C + Safety Pack Start price R 259 950 Key Features: 800kg Payload Rub
pages./new-nissan-navara/: Navara Double Cab | Nissan Navara For Sale | Nissan Springs  Rugged Redefined Nissan Navara Double Cab The Nissan Navara is your ultimate partner for adventure. Combining powerful performance with rugged durability and premium comfort, it’s designed to conquer any terrain. With advanced features and a bold design, the Navara ensures you tackle every journey with confidence. Book a test drive today and experience the thrill for yourself! Available Models Enquire Now Rugged Redefined New Nissan Navara The new locally-produced Nissan Navara has upped the ante in ruggedness, style, safety, comfort and driving pleasure while remaining true to its heritage of durability, reliability, versatility, and fuel efficiency. Monthly from R5 665 Payload (SC) Up to 1144 KG Payload (DC) uP TO 1086 KG Max Power 140kW / 450 Nm Made for your journey Drive off in the Navara that's right for you thanks to the new extended range. If you like it kitted to the max, or simple and standard the new Navara is a showstopper nonetheless, plus it's priced more affordably than before Exterior Design The new Nissan Navara's rugged styling features an aggressive shape, redesigned bumper, grille, LED lighting and hood. The taller bed height adds to its tough profile. The Navara PRO-4X stands out proudly with 17-inch alloy wheels, blacked-out grille, side mirrors, roof rails and side steps. Sophisticated, quiet Interior Design The fatigue-reducing all-day comfort front seats are out of this world, marrying comfort and sophistication. The newly redesigned rear seats have added support plus a fold-down armrest. The new Navara takes premium to new levels. Acoustic glass and added sound insulation throughout creates a quieter interior, while the new high-quality materials add a feeling of sophistication. FIND SANCTUARY WHEREVER YOU GO. Whether it’s a road trip with the family or date night, you’re going and arriving in comfort and style. Featuring recontoured rear sets, rear seat ducts, dual-zone automatic temperature control, intelligent key, auto-folding mirrors, rain sensing wipers and much more. TECHNOLOGY AND CONNECTIVITY. With Nissan Intelligent Mobility to guide you, it's easy to integrate your smartphone and get to where you're going. You're spoiled with tech in the Navara LE and PRO-4X models by an 8" touch screen loaded with NissanConnect, Apple CarPlay, and Android Auto. The Pro-2x and Pro-4x also comes with a navigation system built directly onto your dashboard. ADVANCED DRIVE-ASSIST DISPLAY. Stay in control of the situation and focused on the road with the new Navara’s Advanced Drive-Assist Display. You’ll enjoy a wide variety of information on the available full-colour 7" display, from fuel economy to song track, the intuitive 3D depth and tilt design lets you take it all in at a glance to keep your eyes focused on the road. Safety Driver Assist with Nissan Intelligent Mobility Nissan Intelligent Mobility equips you with the tools to be more confident, connected, and safer on the road . Featuring intelligent forward collision warnings, emergency braking, lane departure and blind spot warnings, rear cross traffic alerts and more. INTELLIGENT AROUND VIEW MONITOR. With the new Navara PRO-2X and PRO-4X models, you can manoeuvre with easy with the 360° around view monitoring system with a virtual composite 360° bird’s-eye view. Choose split-screen close-ups of the front, rear, and curbside views, and get alerted when the system detects moving objects near your vehicle. Navigate tough terrain with the off-road mode. Towing Payload Built for tough. Get the job done with Nissan's innovative two-channel tie-down system with four infinitely adjustable heavy-duty aluminium cleats. Navara offers a payload (Double Cab) up to 1,086 KG and payload (Single Cab) up to 1,144 KG, trailer sway control system and dynamic control system. Off-Road Tech Unstoppable. The new Navara is nearly unstoppable wherever you want to go with off-road hardware and off-road assist. Climbin
pages./all-new-nissan-x-trail/: All-New Nissan X-Trail | Nissan Springs  The 4th Generation The All-New Nissan X-Trail The all-new 4th generation X-TRAIL has been reimagined, capable of crossing over into every aspect of your day with a suite of Nissan Intelligent Mobility safety features, unmatched interior versatility and advanced technology all encased in a modern, athletic exterior. Available Models Enquire Now The 4th Generation All-New Nissan X-Trail The all-new 4th generation X-TRAIL has been reimagined, capable of crossing over into every aspect of your day with a suite of Nissan Intelligent Mobility safety features, unmatched interior versatility and advanced technology all encased in a modern, athletic exterior. Monthly from R9 999 Engine 2.5L PETROL MAX POWER 135KW / 244 NM CYLINDERS 4 Fit in more family adventure The All-New Nissan X-Trail is a spacious crossover with up to seven seats*, and everything you need to keep your family safe and comfortable with advanced Nissan’s safety technologies. With cutting-edge connectivity* to keep everyone entertained, the All-New Nissan X-Trail shows that family-friendly trailblazing is possible. Never compromise on style Get noticed wherever you go with sleek LED headlights, distinctive and imposing front air vents and robust, yet crafted lines. Up front, the unmistakable V-motion grille bears the familiar signature of Nissan’s exciting design DNA, to show that this family crossover refuses to blend into the background. The safest X-TRAIL, ever The All-New X-TRAIL has an extra set of eyes in the form of advanced Nissan Intelligent Mobility safety technology that looks out for you and your family, in every direction. This incredible support system thinks fast and responds faster, combining ProPILOT semi-autonomous driving, Head-Up Displa and a comprehensive suite of active safety interventions ensuring you remain in absolute control, always. Close the door on the chaos outside Enjoy advanced Nissan Driver Assistance* and HD navigation* displayed right in your view as you settle into your comfortable, ergonomically designed seat. Wondering where to place your belongings? Don’t miss the storage space beneath the floating central console. Inside the X-Trail’s cabin, it’s all about quality details – the relaxing atmosphere of ambient lighting*, the soft feel of premium materials and the seamless convenience. All-wheel drive experience Take on new terrains in confidence with Nissan’s unique all-wheel drive technology, now available on X-Trail. Nissan X-Trail delivers the perfect balance between powerful and unprecedented control, with a smooth ride for all family thanks to superior handling on any surface. Tailor your drive even further with 5 selectable Drive Modes, including Normal, Sport, Eco, Off-road and Snow Mode for unmatched levels of comfort. Smarter Spaces A spacious interior is configurable with sliding second row seats, Divide’N’Hide® cargo system and an available third row for seating for up to seven. Rear doors open 85 degrees wide, allowing easy access loading unloading, handy for loading bulky items or buckling children into their car seats. Optimise cabin comfort with three climate contro¹ zones, heated front and rear seats, memory seating and built-in rear door sunshades. Comfort for all. Dial in your adventure Nissan’s most capable X-TRAIL yet. An All-New Intelligent 4x4 system, available on 4x4 models, with direct coupling reacts quicker than ever before, able to seamlessly transfer power from the front wheels to the rear to help enhance stability and traction. Every new day presents new possibilities, and there’s virtually no limit to where you can go. That’s why the All-New X-TRAIL 4x4 models offer hill descent control and up to five drive and terrain modes for practically every scenario. Seamlessly connected to your world The 12.3" HD touchscreen(1) in the New Nissan X-Trail is your portal to NissanConnect: through intuitive navigation, advanced technology and more. With our support, you can drive away in a Nissan while keeping your financial goals in mind. At Nissan Springs, customer satisfaction is our top priority.
